ddls:
CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the location */,
  "elevation" INTEGER /* Elevation of the location */,
  "timezone_offset" TEXT /* Timezone offset from UTC */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the location */,
  "area_km2" REAL /* Area of the location in square kilometers */,
  "climate_zone" TEXT /* Climate zone of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., general consumer, business client, internal analyst) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "subscription_plan" TEXT /* Subscription plan of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecast_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather forecast being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the forecast */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the forecast was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the forecast */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's device */,
  "duration_seconds" INTEGER /* Duration of the access in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecast_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_types" (
  "weather_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather type */,
  "weather_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather type */,
  "weather_type_text" TEXT /* Text description of the weather type */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL to the icon representing the weather type */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the weather type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wind_directions" (
  "wind_direction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wind direction */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Direction of the wind */,
  "wind_direction_abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of wind direction */,
  "wind_direction_full" TEXT /* Full name of wind direction */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL to the icon representing the wind direction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wind_direction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecast_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast version */,
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather forecast */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the forecast */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the version was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the forecast version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecast_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecast_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of metadata */,
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather forecast */,
  "metadata_key" TEXT /* Key for the metadata */,
  "metadata_value" TEXT /* Value for the metadata */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the metadata was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the metadata was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id")
)
